eyebrow.zh: 本地 · 离线 · 零配置

headline.zh:
依赖里藏着指挥 agent 删文件、偷密钥的指令
在它替你执行之前先揪出来
headline.en:
Hidden in your deps: instructions that tell your agent
to delete files or steal keys — catch them before it runs them

sub.zh: 一条命令扫遍项目和所有依赖，把伪装成文档、注释、工具说明、暗中指挥你的编码 agent 去删数据、外传文件、读密钥的句子挑出来。给每一个让 Cursor / Claude Code / Codex 跑在自己代码上的人——干净的依赖零误报。
sub.en: One command scans your project and every dependency, surfacing the sentences disguised as docs, comments or tool descriptions that quietly tell your coding agent to delete data, exfiltrate files or read your keys. For anyone letting Cursor / Claude Code / Codex run on their code — clean deps stay quiet.

title.zh: 你的 agent 读 README 就会照做——文档就是攻击面
title.en: Your agent reads READMEs and obeys — so docs are the attack surface

body.zh: 编码 agent 摄取 README、注释、依赖文档，然后带着文件、shell、网络权限去执行。AgentGuard 把这些当成可执行代码来审：遍历你的项目和每一个依赖，把散落在文档、注释、配置、工具说明里的句子逐句过一遍。
body.en: A coding agent ingests READMEs, comments and dependency docs, then executes them with file, shell and network permissions. AgentGuard treats that prose as executable code: it walks your project and every dependency, inspecting every sentence buried in docs, comments, config and tool descriptions.

chips: › 文档 / 注释 / 配置 / 工具说明都过审

title.zh: 不乱喊狼来了——干净的依赖零误报
title.en: No crying wolf — clean deps stay quiet

body.zh: 「delete」「.env」这些词在普通开发文档里到处都是，普通关键词扫描会把它们全报成危险。AgentGuard 只在一段话明确在对你的 AI / agent 说话时才升级——对着人说的普通文档直接跳过。结果：一份干净的 README 产出零噪音。
body.en: 'delete' and '.env' show up in ordinary dev docs all the time, and a naive keyword scan flags them all. AgentGuard only escalates when a sentence is clearly addressing your AI / agent — ordinary prose aimed at humans is skipped. The result: a clean README produces zero noise.

chips: › 区分「对人」还是「对你的 agent」
› 干净的依赖 = 零噪音

title.zh: 能认出七种瞄准你 agent 的攻击
title.en: Recognizes seven attacks aimed at your agent

body.zh: 每一条命中都告诉你：哪个文件、哪一行、它在指挥你的 agent 干什么——删数据、把项目外传、偷密钥、覆盖指令、提权、埋后门、藏起来。覆盖依赖文档、注释、配置和工具描述里的真实 payload，你也可以自己加规则。
body.en: Every hit tells you which file, which line, and what it's telling your agent to do — delete data, exfiltrate the project, harvest keys, override instructions, escalate privileges, plant a backdoor, or hide. Covers real payloads in dependency docs, comments, config and tool descriptions — and you can add your own rules.

chips: › 删数据 / 外传 / 偷密钥 / 覆盖指令

title.zh: 合进 CI 一行挡住坏依赖
title.en: One line in CI blocks bad deps

body.zh: 发现危险就让构建失败，scan 直接当 CI 或 pre-commit 门禁，无需额外接线。全程本地、离线跑，不要 API key、不联网——结果可复现，机器可读的输出能直接喂给下游工具或存档。
body.en: Any danger fails the build, so scan works as a CI or pre-commit gate with no extra wiring. It runs fully local and offline — no API key, no network — with reproducible results and machine-readable output you can pipe to downstream tools or archive.

chips: › 本地 · 离线 · 无需 API key

headline.zh: 在 agent 替你执行依赖之前，先扫一遍
headline.en: Scan your deps before your agent runs them

sub.zh: 开源、Apache-2.0、永久免费自托管。零安装、零配置、无需 API key。
sub.en: Open source, Apache-2.0, free to self-host forever. Zero install, zero config, no API key.

tag.zh: 装前看清一个依赖真的会指挥你的 agent 干什么
tag.en: See what a dependency will actually tell your agent to do — before you install it
